Environmental Protection.summary: Consistently opposes federal environmental regulations, particularly those affecting fossil fuel industries.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
Congressional Review Act resolution to maintain SEC climate disclosure rule (Senate vote, March 2024)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supported bipartisan criminal justice reform legislation.
voted_for: First Step Act of 2018 (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Opposes tax increases and supports tax cuts, particularly for businesses.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (as House member, December 2017)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Opposes abortion rights and supports restrictions on reproductive healthcare access.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Opposes federal protections for LGBTQ+ individuals in marriage and other areas.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Strongly opposes environmental regulations affecting energy production and has led efforts to block EPA rules.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
EPA power plant emissions standards via Congressional Review Act (2024)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supported major bipartisan criminal justice reform.
voted_for: First Step Act of 2018 (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Opposes tax increases and supports reducing tax burden on businesses and individuals.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with tax provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Opposes abortion rights and federal protections for abortion access.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Opposes federal legislation protecting same-sex marriage.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Opposes federal environmental regulations and advocates for state control over natural resources.
voted_for: H.R. 1 Lower Energy Costs Act to expand fossil fuel production (House vote, March 2023)
voted_against: Congressional Review Act resolution to maintain EPA emissions standards (House vote, 2024)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Opposes tax increases and supports extending tax cuts.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate tax provisions (House vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Opposes abortion rights and supports federal restrictions.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Opposes federal protections for LGBTQ+ individuals.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (House vote, December 2022)

Public School Funding.summary: Supported increased education funding measures in the Wyoming Legislature.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Supported abortion restrictions in the Wyoming Legislature.

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Supported legislation restricting transgender youth healthcare access.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Strongly supports abortion restrictions and sponsored multiple anti-abortion bills.
